response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in hardware optimization, AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload analysis. While Bogdan Szabo has strong software engineering expertise (e.g., web, mobile, embedded systems), his resume does not reflect relevant work in cloud infrastructure for AI, performance bottlenecks in deep-learning workloads, or hardware-software co-design. Additionally, his educational background (Bachelor's in Computer Science and Photography) does not align with the required advanced degrees or specialized technical experience for this principal-level role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack software development experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, D, C++)
Proven track record in optimizing systems (e.g., pricing strategies, low-latency apps, robotic arms)
Strong background in open-source contributions and community-driven projects
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or deep-learning workload optimization
Lacks required advanced educational qualifications (PhD/Master's) or equivalent technical experience for principal-level role
Resume lacks evidence of GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD architecture experience, or hardware-software co-design
